name: Chinese Chicken Corn Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken broth and corn in a large saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Blend cornstarch with cold water and add to soup. Continue cooking uncovered for 3 minutes.
4. Beat egg whites until foamy; stir into soup.
5. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until foamy.
6. Ladle soup into individual bowls and garnish with parsley.
7. Serve hot.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES. CHO: 14g; PRO: 16g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 156. For low-sodium diets, substitute unsalted broth.
